mnemonics: DEEPER DATA: Deep Learning Excels at Extracting Patterns from Enormous, Raw, and Complex Datasets
keyPoints: Excels at processing high-dimensional raw data (e.g., images, audio, text) without extensive manual feature engineering
Scalable performance with increasing data, often outperforming traditional machine learning on large datasets
Capable of learning hierarchical representations and complex non-linear relationships
commonMistakes: Assuming deep learning is always the best solution (for small datasets, simpler models often perform better)
Underestimating the computational resources and data required for effective deep learning
Believing deep learning models are inherently interpretable (they are often 'black boxes')
